scope_note: The package SET is derived from pnpm-lock.yaml (host-independent). Each licence is read verbatim from the installed package.json after a --frozen-lockfile install. Rows with installed:false are optional, platform-gated packages this host does not install; their licence was not read from disk and is recorded as null with an absent_reason, never dropped. 'provenance' below records WHERE the licences were read — it does not describe the scope of this inventory.
